ogTitle: Dutton East vs East Moonta: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dutton East and East Moonta.
heading: Dutton East vs East Moonta — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dutton East, South Australia and East Moonta, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Moonta has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Dutton East (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dutton East or East Moonta safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dutton East has a flood risk score of 52/100, while East Moonta scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dutton East scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. East Moonta scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dutton East or East Moonta?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Moonta has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
